restoran.name: 🍽 Restoran Pro
restoran.description: Buyurtma, menyu, yetkazib berish — hamma narsa tayyor

start.text: 🍽 Restoranmizga xush kelibsiz! Bizda eng mazali taomlar, qulay muhit va tezkor yetkazib berish xizmati mavjud. ⭐ 4.9 reyting | 50,000+ mamnun mijoz 👇 Quyidagidan tanlang:

🥗 salatlar.text: 🥗 Salatlar 1. 🥬 Sezar salat — 35,000 so'm Tovuq, parmezan, kruton, sezar sous 2. 🥒 Grek salat — 30,000 so'm Pomidor, bodring, feta, zaytun 3. 🥕 Vitamin salat — 25,000 so'm Sabzavotlar aralashmasi

🍖 asosiy taomlar.text: 🍖 Asosiy Taomlar 1. 🥩 Tenderli steak — 85,000 so'm Premium mol go'shti, grill 2. 🍗 Tovuq filesi — 55,000 so'm Griilda tayyorlangan, sous bilan 3. 🐟 Baliq file — 65,000 so'm Oq baliq, limon sousi bilan 4. 🍖 Qo'ziqorin bilan go'sht — 75,000 so'm

🍰 desertlar.text: 🍰 Desertlar 1. 🎂 Tiramisu — 30,000 so'm 2. 🍮 Krem-bryule — 25,000 so'm 3. 🍫 Shokoladli fondan — 35,000 so'm 4. 🍨 Muzqaymoq (3 ta) — 20,000 so'm

🍕 pitsa.text: 🍕 Pitsa 1. Margarita — 45,000 so'm 2. Pepperoni — 55,000 so'm 3. 4 pishloq — 60,000 so'm 4. Tovuqli BBQ — 55,000 so'm 📏 Hajmi: 30 sm

🎨 dizayn.text: 🎨 Dizayn kurslari 1. UI/UX Dizayn — 3 oy 💰 1,200,000 so'm/oy 2. Grafik Dizayn — 2 oy 💰 900,000 so'm/oy 3. 3D Modeling — 4 oy 💰 1,500,000 so'm/oy

🇬🇧 ingliz tili.text: 🇬🇧 Ingliz tili 📊 Darajalar: • Beginner — 500,000/oy • Elementary — 550,000/oy • Intermediate — 600,000/oy • Upper-Int — 700,000/oy • IELTS Prep — 1,000,000/oy 👨‍🏫 Native speaker bilan darslar!

👨‍🏫 o'qituvchilar.text: 👨‍🏫 Bizning jamoamiz 1. Alisher Karimov — Python, 8 yil tajriba 2. Madina Rahimova — UI/UX, Google sertifikat 3. James Wilson — English, Native speaker 4. Bobur Toshmatov — SMM, 50+ loyiha

💰 narxlar.text: 💰 Narxlar 💻 Dasturlash: 1,500,000 - 2,500,000/oy 🎨 Dizayn: 900,000 - 1,500,000/oy 📊 Marketing: 600,000 - 800,000/oy 🇬🇧 Ingliz tili: 500,000 - 1,000,000/oy 🎁 Chegirmalar: • To'liq to'lov: -10% • 3+ kishi guruh: -15% • Talabalar: -20%
